title: Spacer
description: A spacer adds consistent vertical or horizontal space using UDS space tokens.
whenToUse: When CSS gap or margin is not available (e.g. in a flow where children cannot be flex/grid items). To enforce a specific token-sized gap.
whenNotToUse: When you can use CSS gap or margin with tokens directly. Prefer CSS layout properties.
_legacyAccessibilityNotes: Decorative only. Do not place interactive elements inside a spacer.
